name: Savory Rice Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 2 (10 oz) packages Green Giant Rice Originals Frozen Long Grain White & Wild Rice.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to the package directions.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté onion and celery in margarine until tender.
3. Add water and stuff mix; stir in the cooked rice, tossing lightly.
4. Use to stuff a Merrie Crown Roast of Pork.
5. Optionally, bake the stuffing separately in a lightly buttered 2-quart casserole at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
